Daniel Berko, Esq. (415) 771-6174 for Defendant and Moving Party Kolkey
Dwight C. Donovan, Esq., MBV Law LLP (415) 781-4400 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Asher
RULING:
Dismissal of entire action was filed on 07/21/04. On the issue of whether the Defendant is entitled to a ruling on the merits as to its Motion To Strike, DEFENDANT ZORA KOLKEY'S Motion To Strike is CONTINUED to 09/29/04 in Dept. 301. Plaintiff shall file and serve its opposition no later than 09/17/04; Defendant shall file its reply no later than 09/24/04. Counsel shall provide courtesy copies to the Court. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
